title: Yoga Sutras 2.1-11: The Five Afflictions
description: Patanjali identifies the five root causes of suffering: ignorance, ego, attachment, aversion, and clinging to life.
introduction: Patanjali identifies the five root causes of suffering: ignorance, ego, attachment, aversion, and clinging to life.

translation.text: Ignorance, ego, attachment, aversion, and clinging to life are the five afflictions.
